daily.today_energy: Your vibe is electric today, Gemini. The universe is rewarding your curiosity with unexpected connections and moments of clarity. Trust the pull toward new conversations and ideas—they're exactly what you need right now.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, vulnerability hits different today. Someone's picking up on your authenticity, and it's magnetic. Let your guard down a little—real recognizes real, and you're glowing.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharp and your timing is immaculate. This is the energy to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or reach out to someone who could matter. Your network is your net worth today, so show up authentically.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and novelty. Try something new—a different route for a walk, a class you've been curious about, anything that breaks the routine. Your energy lifts when you're stimulated and engaged.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're feeling more grounded than usual, which is honestly refreshing. Lean into conversations that matter—your words hit different right now. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language this week. Single? Someone's been noticing your vibe. Don't overthink it. Let things unfold naturally instead of running through fifty scenarios in your head.
weekly.career: Your ideas are *chef's kiss* right now, but execution matters more than perfection. Pitch that project, send that email, have that conversation. Your confidence is magnetic—people want to follow your lead.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler energy this week. Prioritize sleep and hydration over grinding. Moving your body should feel good, not punishing. Listen to what actually energizes you instead of what sounds productive.
